title: March 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 29''' is the 88th day of the year (89th in leap years). There are 277 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Elizabeth Hand]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Amy Sedaris]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Lucy Lawless]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 8|''Star Wars Weekly'' 8]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] (re-issue)
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 145|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 145]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: Jedi Power Battles: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 3]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 12]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2005]] – ''[[For the Love of the Film]]'' released.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 3|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 3]] released.
*2006 – ''[[The Return of Tag & Bink: Special Edition]]'' published.
*2006 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 8: The Last Siege, the Final Truth]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Star Wars Craft Book]]'' published.
*[[2017]] — ''[[CinéMagique]]'' closes.
*[[2019]] – [[Shane Rimmer]] dies.
*2019 – "[[Darth Vader vs. the Rebel Fleet - Fearsome Fighter Pilot]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Summit]]" and "[[Plan 99 (episode)|Plan 99]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – "[[Chapter 21: The Pirate]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – [[Return of the Jedi – Jabba's Palace 1|''Return of the Jedi – Jabba's Palace'' 1]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic — The Blade 4|''The High Republic — The Blade'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 7|''The High Republic'' (2022) 7]] published.
<noinclude>
